case_title: TUA TUPUIVAO VS. TALIFILEMU MOELASI et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TUPUIVAO, TUA AS TO DEFENDANT MOELASI, TALIFILEMU ALOISIO, TELESIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-29-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED JAN-17-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALOISIO, TELESIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED JAN-17-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOELASI, TALIFILEMU
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-29-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-29-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUPUIVAO, TUA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOELASI, TALIFILEMU ALOISIO, TELESIA THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS WERE REASONABLY NECESSARY IN THE DEFENSE OF HIS FAMILY MEMBERS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT MOELASI, TALIFILEMU ALOISIO, TELESIA
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TUPUIVAO, TUA
